subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath manifested Himself upon the horizons once through His Name, the Best-Beloved, whereupon the hearts of the lovers were set aflame with yearning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی فی الافاق مره باسمه المحبوب اذا اشتعلت افئده العشاق شوقا
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement
